---
title: "PlottingSVG — SVGUtils"
format: html
---

## Role

`PlottingSVG/SVGUtils.hpp` declares shared helpers for SVG export:

- **`transformVertexToSVG`** — apply an MVP matrix, perspective divide, then map NDC \([-1,1]^2\) to SVG pixel coordinates with the Y axis flipped (top = 0).
- **`colorToSVGHex`** — clamp RGB to 8-bit channels and format an uppercase `#RRGGBB` string (alpha is not embedded; use SVG opacity attributes separately).

Implementations live in `SVGUtils.cpp` (non-inline) and are linked via the `PlottingSVG` target.

## See also

- [PlottingSVG index](index.qmd)
- [Roadmap](roadmap.md) — Steps 1.2–1.3
